chezmoi_branch.description: The branch to use for chezmoi. Empty for default branch.

atuin_user.description: The user to use for Atuin. Leave empty if you don't want to use Atuin.

atuin_password.description: The token to use for Atuin. Leave empty if you don't want to use Atuin.

atuin_key.description: The key to use for Atuin. Leave empty if you don't want to use Atuin.

keep_going.description: Ignore errors during setup and continue execution.

debug.description: Write diagnostic info to /var/log/chezmoi-feature-0-build.log (build phase) and /var/log/chezmoi-feature-1-postcreate.log (postCreate phase).

env_vars.description: Semicolon-separated KEY=VALUE pairs to export as environment variables (e.g. MY_VAR=hello;OTHER=world).

defer_scripts.description: Skip chezmoi run_* scripts at build time and run them in postCreateCommand instead. Combine with the persist-nix-store feature so the Nix store persists across rebuilds. When false (default) behaviour is identical to the previous version.

extra_args.description: Extra flags appended to chezmoi apply at build time and in postCreateCommand. Defaults to '--exclude=encrypted'. Set to empty string to apply encrypted files (provide the decryption key via env_vars).
